title: potentilla iranica
intro: Potentilla iranica, also known as the Iranian cinquefoil, is a perennial herb belonging to the rose family (Rosaceae) native to the mountainous regions of Iran and surrounding areas. The plant contains flavonoids, such as quercetin and kaempferol, which are known for their medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Potentilla iranica include reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health, as well as exhibiting potential anti-cancer and antimicrobial properties. Herbal preparations of Potentilla iranica can be made into infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, and are often used in traditional medicine to support overall well-being.
